expertise.subtitle: What I bring to every project.

cards.title: Cloud & Fullstack

meta.title: Kim Van Ha — Senior Fullstack Developer
meta.description: Personal portfolio for Kim Van Ha showcasing React, Next.js, design systems, QA, and AI assistant features.

profile.name: Kim Van Ha
profile.summary: Senior frontend engineer with nearly 5 years of experience building enterprise-grade React and Next.js products for logistics, travel, and ecommerce domains. I combine reusable design systems, robust testing, and cloud-native fullstack delivery to create polished applications recruiters love.
highlights: Trusted to deliver mission-critical interfaces for airport service systems.
Deep experience with React, Next.js, component architecture, and UI systems.
A pragmatic tester who builds maintainable products with Jest, RTL, and Playwright.
Experienced with AWS serverless workflows, API integration, and CI/CD pipelines.

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Human-centered engineering with design system clarity.
body: I build polished digital products for enterprise customers, focusing on the intersection of frontend architecture, design systems, and testable delivery. My work turns complex workflows into intuitive experiences.
I bring deep experience across React, Next.js, UI component systems, and modern testing patterns — alongside practical backend integration with AWS and serverless functions.
My strongest impact is helping teams move faster with predictable interfaces, consistent quality, and elegant execution.

categories.title: Frontend & UI
categories.description: Designing rich web interfaces and reusable component systems for modern products.

categories.title: Backend & Cloud
categories.description: Connecting frontend applications to clean APIs and serverless infrastructure.

categories.title: Testing & Quality
categories.description: Ensuring product reliability with automated regression coverage and E2E flows.

categories.title: Design System Mindset
categories.description: Creating scalable UI systems with atomic structure and shared design language.

experience.title: experience
experience.subtitle: Roles, deliverables, and impact across major engagements.

items.description: Delivering airport service experiences for baggage, parking, and membership services using React and AWS serverless infrastructure.
bullets: Built and maintained multiple React and Next.js applications with strong UI consistency across services.
Integrated APIs for baggage tracking, smart parking, and member rewards to boost operational efficiency.
Implemented serverless backend functions with AWS Lambda and API Gateway for scalable business workflows.
Collaborated with designers to deliver accessible, responsive user interfaces aligned with airport branding.
Participated in CI/CD automation across S3, CloudFront, and deployment pipelines.

items.description: Shipped real-time chat and video collaboration features for a 3D-enabled communication platform.
bullets: Developed the user interface for real-time chat, video calling, and social features using React.
Integrated 3D Unity environments into web flows while prioritizing responsive behaviour and performance.
Collaborated closely with backend teams to synchronize real-time messaging and connection state.
Implemented friend, notification, and profile interactions to maximize user engagement.
Optimized cross-browser compatibility and client performance for media-heavy flows.

items.description: Delivered a multi-religion online marriage registration product that emphasizes accessibility and streamlined user journeys.
bullets: Developed polished web pages using React and Ant Design System patterns.
Worked with designers to ensure the interface matched UI/UX expectations and business requirements.
Optimized page load time and improved responsiveness across mobile and desktop.
Managed data integration and API interactions to ensure reliable form submission and status tracking.
Delivered ongoing maintenance and security improvements for the platform.

projects.title: work
projects.subtitle: Selected projects across enterprise, platform, and web.

items.title: Changi Airport Smart Services
items.summary: A premium airport services suite that modernizes baggage handling, parking, and membership workflows for travelers and operations teams.
highlights: Delivered consistent interfaces across multiple web applications using React and Next.js.
Designed service-driven experiences for travelers with airport membership and rewards features.
Built serverless backend support using AWS Lambda and CloudFront to minimize latency.
details: Led the frontend architecture for an airport operations suite spanning traveler-facing web apps and internal dashboards.
Delivered responsive experiences with role-based navigation, real-time updates, and mobile-friendly boarding workflows.
Optimized performance with serverless APIs and CDN delivery for fast loading across airport terminals.

items.title: RSupports Chat & Video Platform
items.summary: A real-time communication platform integrating chat, video calls, and immersive 3D interfaces for collaborative virtual meetings.
highlights: Implemented chat and video UI flows with performance and accessibility in mind.
Integrated 3D Unity environments into a React web experience.
Collaborated on real-time synchronization with backend messaging services.
details: Built immersive communication flows with chat, video, and interactive controls for modern team collaboration.
Ensured accessibility and low-latency streaming for remote participants across devices.
Coordinated cross-team integration of messaging, signaling, and 3D experience modules.

items.title: OMJS NCS Registration Portal
items.summary: A multi-faith marriage registration and event management product designed to simplify booking and user onboarding.
highlights: Built a responsive user journey using Material UI and React.
Delivered cross-platform compatibility and accessible interface improvements.
Supported backend integration for status tracking and event workflows.
details: Developed a user-centric booking experience with guided forms and progress tracking.
Delivered accessible layouts for multi-device support and clear event status updates.
Built integrations for registration workflows, payment validation, and backend status checks.

items.title: EVHub — Volkswagen
items.summary: A car discovery platform for Volkswagen customers featuring personalized model matching, detailed specs, and an EV charging station map.
highlights: Built an interactive car-finder quiz to guide users toward their ideal Volkswagen model.
Integrated a charging station map to surface nearby EV infrastructure for prospective buyers.
Implemented unit tests with Jest to validate key UI interactions and data flows.
details: Developed a customer-facing product discovery experience using React and Material UI based on the Volkswagen design system.
Delivered cross-browser compatible interfaces with fast load times and smooth interactivity across all devices.
Ensured code reliability through unit testing and collaborated with backend teams for seamless API integration.

items.title: Corsair E-Commerce
items.summary: A global e-commerce storefront for gaming peripherals, built on Shopify with advanced product search and filtering powered by Algolia.
highlights: Developed the Next.js storefront with GraphQL-driven data fetching from Shopify.
Implemented fast, faceted product search and filtering using Algolia.
Cross-reviewed code with team members across a 200-person engineering organization.
details: Built and maintained a large-scale e-commerce platform for Corsair's full range of gaming peripherals and accessories.
Leveraged Apollo Client and GraphQL to manage product data, cart state, and checkout flows efficiently.
Resolved UI issues and reported task progress to customer managers throughout the engagement.

items.title: Taffi Styling App
items.summary: A stylist customization app enabling users to browse and personalize styles across desktop and mobile for enhanced shopping experiences.
highlights: Developed cross-device styling flows with React and Next.js targeting both mobile and desktop audiences.
Implemented GraphQL data integration for real-time style and catalog interactions.
Collaborated on bug resolution and UI quality with a cross-functional team.
details: Built a fashion customization experience using Next.js and Material UI, optimized for Safari and mobile browsers.
Integrated GraphQL to handle dynamic catalog content and stylist configuration data.
Supported ongoing maintenance and UI improvements throughout the product lifecycle.

items.title: NGV Creative Index
items.summary: A data visualization website showcasing statistics for local brand companies, built with Next.js and animation libraries for an engaging narrative experience.
highlights: Built a statistics-driven web experience using Next.js and TailwindCSS with smooth animations.
Delivered cross-browser compatible layouts for IE and Chrome.
Collaborated with a team of 10 to meet client delivery milestones.
details: Developed an interactive data presentation site for National Gallery of Victoria using Next.js and TailwindCSS.
Integrated animation libraries to bring statistical content to life with polished motion design.
Supported deployment on AWS and participated in code reviews with the project team.

items.title: OrderBuddy Web App
items.summary: A restaurant management web application enabling efficient customer order handling and integrated payment processing.
highlights: Built the frontend order management experience using React and TailwindCSS.
Integrated Stripe API to handle secure payment processing for restaurant transactions.
Ensured cross-browser compatibility across IE and Chrome for broad user reach.
details: Developed a responsive restaurant ordering and payment platform for a team of 60.
Implemented real-time order management workflows with React, optimizing for speed and usability.
Collaborated on bug fixes, UI improvements, and reported task progress to client managers.

items.title: Graphene Internal Portal
items.summary: An internal knowledge platform for storing and interacting with academic content — lectures, videos, authors, and journals — with Excel export capabilities.
highlights: Built data-rich table interfaces for browsing and exporting academic content to Excel.
Collaborated with the product owner to clarify requirements and define user experiences.
Delivered new functionalities with TypeScript and REST API integrations.
details: Developed an internal web platform used by a 50-person organization to manage and explore academic resources.
Built interactive data tables with deep-link detail views and Excel export for operational workflows.
Worked directly with stakeholders to identify user needs and translate them into product features.

design_system.title: Design system philosophy
design_system.subtitle: Reusable UI systems that scale with product teams.
body: I approach design systems with an atomic mindset: clean primitives, consistent tokens, and modular patterns that are easy to reuse and evolve.
My experience includes building component libraries with Storybook, Ant Design, and MUI, then translating those systems into production-ready frontend code.
focus_items: Atomic structure for reliable interface building
Design tokens for consistent visual language
Storybook collaboration between designers and engineers
Component tests, documentation, and version control

quality.title: Testing & engineering quality
quality.subtitle: Delivery practices for stable, scalable product work.
body: Engineering quality is a first-class concern. I combine test automation, CI/CD, and accessible interfaces so features ship with confidence.
The products I build are structured to support both fast iteration and predictable maintenance, making them strong candidates for recruiter review and production stability.
items: Unit testing with Jest and React Testing Library
Component validation with Storybook and reusable patterns
CI/CD readiness for faster, safer deployments
Accessibility-first UI delivery and semantic markup

contact.title: contact
contact.subtitle: Available for select opportunities.
contact.availability: Open to senior frontend and fullstack roles, technical leadership, and product-focused engineering. Let's build something great.

footer.left: Designed for recruiter review and scaled product delivery.
